evals.prompt: Use pi-computer-use to inspect the current frontmost controllable macOS window. Call screenshot first. If a semantic state is returned, finish with EVAL_RESULT pass and a one-sentence description of the app/window. Do not click or type.

Use pi-computer-use to discover available GUI targets. Call list_apps, choose one visible non-background app from the result, then call list_windows for that app. Do not interact with the app beyond discovery. Pass if at least one controllable window is found or if list_windows clearly reports no controllable windows for the chosen app.
